variants: Sabina Mitrevska is a forensic anthropologist specializing in analyzing human remains within the framework of Forensic Anthropology. Her doctoral studies were significantly shaped by her mentor and doctoral advisor, Emilia Veras, whose guidance was pivotal to her research. She has contributed to the academic community through publications in Aurora Bracket Press. The Borealis Impact Initiative serves as the primary funding source for her research projects, enabling her to advance her work. In addition to her forensic pursuits, Sabina holds a professional license called the Kinetic Energy Broker License.
